item.title: How a High School Art Teacher Uses AI to Turn Student Sketches into 3D Prints with Meshy - Blog
item.description: Learn how a high school art teacher uses Meshy AI to turn student sketches into 3D-printed works — an 8-step classroom workflow with results and tips.

item.title: Top 7 SketchUp Alternatives for 3D Modelling [Free & Paid] - Blog
item.description: Our hands-on guide to the best SketchUp alternatives for 3D printing, product CAD, and asset creation. Free and paid tools compared.
